statement.markdown: Given a singly linked list, remove the node at a given index (0-indexed).
statement.notes: Do not create new nodes when removing.

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: void deleteAtIndex(ListNode* &head, int index); };
starterCode.java: class Solution { public void deleteAtIndex(ListNode head, int index) { } }
starterCode.python: class Solution: def deleteAtIndex(self, head: ListNode, index: int) -> None:

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: void deleteAtIndex(ListNode* &head, int index) { ListNode* cur = head; if (index == 0) { head = head->next; } else { while (index-- > 0 && cur->next != nullptr) cur = cur->next; if (cur->next != nullptr) cur->next = cur->next->next; } } };
buggyStarterCode.java: class Solution { public void deleteAtIndex(ListNode head, int index) { if (index == 0) head = head.next; else { ListNode cur = head; while (index-- > 0 && cur.next != null) cur = cur.next; if (cur.next != null) cur.next = cur.next.next; } } }

functionSignature.python: def deleteAtIndex(self, head: ListNode, index: int) -> None:

solutions.python:
import sys

class Solution:
    def deleteAtIndex(self, head: ListNode, index: int) -> None:
        if index == 0:
            head = head.next
        else:
            cur = head
            while index > 0 and cur.next:
                cur = cur.next
            if cur.next:
                cur.next = cur.next.next


def print_list(node):
    while node:
        print(node.val, end=' ')
        node = node.next
    print()


# Test
# print_list(head)

# Read from sys.stdin
line1 = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
line2 = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
line2 = line2.split(' ')
index = int(line1)
arr = list(map(int, line2))
head = ListNode(arr[0])
m = head
for i in range(1, len(arr)):
    m.next = ListNode(arr[i])
    m = m.next

# Read from sys.stdin and remove
line1 = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
line2 = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
line2 = line2.split(' ')
index = int(line1)
arr = list(map(int, line2))
head = ListNode(arr[0])
m = head
for i in range(1, len(arr)):
    m.next = ListNode(arr[i])
    m = m.next

# Call the correct function
solution = Solution()
solution.deleteAtIndex(head, index - 1)

# Print the final list
print_list(head)
